parameters.jsCode:
const strategies = [
  {
    id: 'btc_ema50_rsi_momentum',
    symbol: 'BTCUSD',
    coinGeckoId: 'bitcoin',
    direction: 'LONG',
    days: 90,
    conditions: { price_above_ema: 50, rsi_above: 45, macd_bullish: true, volume_spike: 1.05 },
    slPercent: 0.98,
    tpPercent: 1.02,
    riskPercent: 0.25,
    active: true
  },
  {
    id: 'eth_ema20_macd',
    symbol: 'ETHUSD',
    coinGeckoId: 'ethereum',
    direction: 'LONG',
    days: 90,
    conditions: { price_above_ema: 20, macd_bullish: true },
    slPercent: 0.97,
    tpPercent: 1.03,
    riskPercent: 0.25,
    active: true
  }
];

return strategies.filter((strategy) => strategy.active).map((strategy) => ({ json: strategy }));

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "message": "Backtest complete
Strategy: " + $json.payload.strategy_id + "
Symbol: " + $json.payload.symbol + "
Trades: " + $json.payload.trades + "
Win rate: " + $json.payload.win_rate + "%
Net P/L: " + $json.payload.net_pnl + "
Profit factor: " + $json.payload.profit_factor + "
Max DD: " + $json.payload.max_drawdown + "

Research only. No live execution."
}
